privacy.notes: This contract bundle contains synthetic metadata fixtures only. Licensed mapping tables and grouper content are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: list_ar_drg_mapping_records
commands.notes: List synthetic registry entries for versioned AR-DRG, ICD-10-AM, ACHI, and ACS relationships without embedding licensed table content.

commands.name: validate_ar_drg_mapping_compatibility
commands.notes: Check whether a synthetic registry entry matches the declared pricing-year and version window.

commands.name: external_reference_placeholder
commands.notes: Describe a local-only placeholder for user-supplied licensed grouper or mapping assets.

registry_entry_types.label: Versioned mapping record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Metadata-only relationship between a pricing year and an AR-DRG / ICD-10-AM / ACHI / ACS version set.

registry_entry_types.label: Provenance bundle
registry_entry_types.purpose: Source-manifest and checksum metadata for a committed synthetic fixture.

registry_entry_types.label: License boundary record
registry_entry_types.purpose: Declares what the committed fixtures may and may not include.

registry_entry_types.label: External grouper reference
registry_entry_types.purpose: Local placeholder for a user-supplied licensed grouper, file exchange, or service reference.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only registry
compatibility_rules.description: Reject registry entries that embed licensed table rows, grouper logic, or other restricted content.

compatibility_rules.label: Version alignment
compatibility_rules.description: Require the declared ICD-10-AM, ACHI, ACS, and AR-DRG versions to align with the selected pricing year.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared license boundary
compatibility_rules.description: Require each fixture bundle to declare whether it is metadata only and whether restricted assets are excluded.

compatibility_rules.label: External reference present
compatibility_rules.description: Record a local placeholder for any user-supplied grouper or mapping asset instead of implying a bundled implementation.

examples.name: versioned-mapping-registry
examples.description: Synthetic version-specific registry records with provenance and local reference placeholders.

examples.name: license-boundary
examples.description: Synthetic declaration of the metadata-only license boundary.

examples.name: external-grouper-reference
examples.description: Synthetic local placeholder for a user-supplied licensed grouper or mapping reference.
